title: Samson and the Slave Queen
writer: Gabriele D'Annunzio, Umberto Lenzi, Guido Malatesta
actors: Pierre Brice, Sergio Ciani, Moira Orfei
plot: The king of Nogara dies, leaving behind a will naming one of his nieces as his successor. Will it be blonde and virtuous Isabella or evil, dark-haired Malva? Each woman relies on a hero to locate the will. Malva hires the bare-che...
